sentences.target: On engage un serveur cet été.

translations.fr: On engage un serveur cet été.
translations.en: We're hiring a waiter this summer.
translations.es: Este verano vamos a contratar a un camarero.
translations.de: Wir stellen diesen Sommer einen Kellner ein.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今年夏天要招一名服务员。
translations.yue: 我哋今個夏天會請一位侍應。
translations.pt: Neste verão vamos contratar um garçom.
translations.tr: Bu yaz bir garson işe alacağız.
translations.vi: Mùa hè này chúng tôi sẽ tuyển một nhân viên phục vụ.
translations.nl: Deze zomer nemen we een ober aan.
translations.hi: इस गर्मी हम एक वेटर रखेंगे.
translations.el: Φέτος το καλοκαίρι θα προσλάβουμε έναν σερβιτόρο.
translations.nb: Til sommer ansetter vi en servitør.
translations.id: Musim panas ini kami akan merekrut seorang pramusaji.
translations.sv: I sommar anställer vi en servitör.
translations.da: Til sommer ansætter vi en tjener.
translations.ja: この夏、私たちはウェイターを雇います。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal or colloquial ‘we’); functions as the subject of the verb.
Main verb, présent de l’indicatif (3rd singular); transitive, selects direct object ‘un serveur’ and a temporal complement.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner introducing the noun ‘serveur’ as direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of ‘engage’.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular (form used before vowel); modifies ‘été’ to specify the time frame.
Common noun; functions as a temporal circumstantial complement (‘this summer’).

sentences.target: Tu engages la conversation avec elle.

translations.fr: Tu engages la conversation avec elle.
translations.en: You start a conversation with her.
translations.de: Du beginnst ein Gespräch mit ihr.
translations.pt: Você começa uma conversa com ela.
translations.vi: Bạn bắt đầu nói chuyện với cô ấy.
translations.nl: Je begint een gesprek met haar.
translations.hi: तुम उससे बात शुरू करते हो.
translations.nb: Du starter en samtale med henne.
translations.sv: Du börjar ett samtal med henne.
translations.da: Du indleder en samtale med hende.
translations.ja: あなたは彼女と会話を始めます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of ‘engages’.
Main verb, présent de l’indicatif (2nd singular); transitive, takes direct object ‘la conversation’ and PP ‘avec elle’.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘conversation’ (direct object).
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘engages’.
Preposition introducing the comitative complement ‘elle’.
Stressed pronoun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘avec’.

sentences.target: La mairie engage des travaux lundi.

translations.fr: La mairie engage des travaux lundi.
translations.en: The town hall starts construction work on Monday.
translations.es: El ayuntamiento inicia las obras el lunes.
translations.de: Das Rathaus beginnt am Montag mit den Bauarbeiten.
translations.it: Il comune avvia i lavori lunedì.
translations.yue: 市政府喺星期一開始工程。
translations.ru: Мэрия начнёт строительные работы в понедельник.
translations.pt: A prefeitura inicia as obras na segunda-feira.
translations.tr: Belediye pazartesi günü inşaat çalışmalarına başlıyor.
translations.vi: Tòa thị chính sẽ bắt đầu thi công vào thứ Hai.
translations.ar: البلدية تبدأ أعمال البناء يوم الاثنين.
translations.nl: De gemeente start maandag met de werkzaamheden.
translations.uk: Мерія розпочне будівельні роботи в понеділок.
translations.hu: A városháza hétfőn kezdi a munkálatokat.
translations.hi: नगर निगम सोमवार को निर्माण कार्य शुरू करेगा.
translations.pl: Ratusz rozpocznie prace budowlane w poniedziałek.
translations.el: Ο δήμος ξεκινά τα έργα τη Δευτέρα.
translations.id: Balai kota akan memulai pekerjaan konstruksi pada hari Senin.
translations.cs: Radnice zahájí stavební práce v pondělí.
translations.ja: 市役所は月曜日に工事を開始します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for ‘mairie’ (subject NP).
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject NP; subject of ‘engage’.
Main verb, présent de l’indicatif (3rd singular); transitive, takes direct object ‘des travaux’ and a temporal complement ‘lundi’.
Indefinite plural article; determiner introducing ‘travaux’ as direct object.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of ‘engage’.
Noun functioning as a temporal modifier (‘on Monday’).

sentences.target: Je préfère engager un plombier rapidement.

translations.fr: Je préfère engager un plombier rapidement.
translations.en: I prefer to hire a plumber quickly.
translations.es: Prefiero contratar a un fontanero rápidamente.
translations.de: Ich ziehe es vor, schnell einen Klempner zu beauftragen.
translations.ko: 저는 배관공을 빨리 부르는 게 좋아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我更倾向于尽快找个水管工。
translations.yue: 我寧願快啲請個水喉佬。
translations.tr: Bir tesisatçıyı hızlıca çağırmayı tercih ederim.
translations.vi: Tôi thích thuê thợ sửa ống nước nhanh chóng.
translations.nl: Ik geef er de voorkeur aan snel een loodgieter in te huren.
translations.hi: मैं जल्दी से एक प्लंबर को बुलाना पसंद करता हूँ.
translations.el: Προτιμώ να προσλάβω έναν υδραυλικό γρήγορα.
translations.nb: Jeg foretrekker å leie inn en rørlegger raskt.
translations.id: Saya lebih suka segera memanggil tukang ledeng.
translations.sv: Jag föredrar att snabbt anlita en rörmokare.
translations.ro: Prefer să angajez rapid un instalator.
translations.da: Jeg foretrækker at hyre en VVS-montør hurtigt.
translations.ja: 私は配管工は早く呼ぶほうがいいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of ‘préfère’.
Main verb, présent de l’indicatif (1st singular); takes infinitival complement ‘engager’.
Infinitive verb (xcomp of ‘préfère’); transitive, selects direct object ‘un plombier’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘plombier’.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the infinitive ‘engager’.
Adverb of manner; modifies ‘engager’ to indicate speed.

Je préfère engager un plombier rapidement.
